title.rendered: AMI Presents on TPM Usage at UEFI Plugfest

content.rendered:
Source: SecurityBoulevard.com

HPBird Chen presents at AMI’s UEFI plugfest on TPM usage in presentation titled ‘Advanced Trusted Platform Module (TPM) Usage’.
Download the full presentation here: https://www.uefi.org/sites/default/files/resources/UEFI_Plugfest_Advanced_TPM_Usage_Fall_2018.pdf
See a full list of all presentations at the plugfest:
https://www.uefi.org/learning_center/presentationsandvideos
